basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitbhilai.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation with at least 1 year of industry/research experience or M.Tech/ME/MS in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation or related areas, GATE qualification or National-level examination conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. or 2 years of professional experience
qualification.details: Graduate in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation with at least 1 year of industry/research experience OR M.Tech/ME/MS in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation or related areas. Must have qualified in GATE or a National-level examination conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. OR have 2 years of professional experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus applicable HRA.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Bhilai Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Bhilai JRF position is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation with relevant experience or an M.Tech/ME/MS in related fields, along with GATE qualification or equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF post is 28 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Bhilai JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The JRF position at IIT Bhilai is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Bhilai located?
faq.answer: IIT Bhilai is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 491001.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
